$description: Per-screen handoff spec for "Vacation Care Calendar" (S1) in flow "vacation-care". Generated by scripts/build-handoff.mjs — do not edit by hand.
name: Vacation Care Calendar
purpose: Month view of scheduled activities; jump into a day's forms.
exit: → S2 via the List View switch; → S4 by clicking an activity chip; → S3 via Add Activity
layout: Page head: title + Calendar/List segmented switch (right)
Card header: ‹ Month YYYY › nav + Today (month view only — modelled on the product's vue-cal calendar)
7-col Monday-start grid. Day cell: date number (today in a teal circle), activity chips (name, booked/capacity, optional 'N forms missing' in error red)
Days inside the holiday period are highlighted green; only those days expose a '+ Add Activity' (on hover only)

redlines.spec: 26px teal filled circle on the date number

behaviour: Month view only (modelled on the product's vue-cal calendar). 7-col Monday-start grid; leading blanks from the 1st weekday.
‹ / › page by month, bounded to Jan 2025 – Dec 2027 (chevrons disable at the bounds). Today returns to the demo data month (Mar 2026).
Today's date shows in a teal circle. Activities render only in the data month in the prototype.
Clicking an activity chip opens that activity's Forms table (S4).

Days in the holiday period are highlighted green. Only those days expose '+ Add Activity', and only on hover (or keyboard focus-within); it opens Program Setup (S3). Non-holiday days expose nothing on hover.
a11y: Month-nav and Today are buttons with accessible names.
Activity chips + Add Activity are buttons; Add Activity is revealed on :hover and :focus-within so it's keyboard-reachable.
Activity chips need a visible focus ring (gap A5); 'forms missing' must not rely on colour alone — keep the text.

acceptance.assert: prev disabled at 2025-01; next disabled at 2027-12

acceptance.text: Activities only show in the data month.
Clicking an activity opens its Forms table.
acceptance.assert: click(activityChip) -> route == S4 with activity in context

acceptance.text: Add Activity exists only on holiday-period (green) days, hidden until hover/focus.
acceptance.assert: count(.vc-add) == holidayDays; .vc-add opacity 0 by default, 1 on day-cell :hover/:focus-within; non-holiday days have no .vc-add
